---
title: "MandEval"
title-block-style: none
pagetitle: "MandEval | Mesfin Genie"
description: "Effectiveness and consequences of Australia’s COVID-19 vaccine mandates. The programme evaluates vaccine mandate policies, uptake, public preferences and policy design trade-offs."
page-layout: full
image: /assets/img/og-card.png
---

```{=html}
<header class="page-header"><div class="page-shell narrow"><p class="eyebrow">Project</p><h1>MandEval</h1><p class="lead">Effectiveness and consequences of Australia’s COVID-19 vaccine mandates. The programme evaluates vaccine mandate policies, uptake, public preferences and policy design trade-offs.</p></div></header><section class="content-section"><div class="page-shell narrow"><h2>Research question and relevance</h2><p>Effectiveness and consequences of Australia’s COVID-19 vaccine mandates. The programme evaluates vaccine mandate policies, uptake, public preferences and policy design trade-offs.</p><h2>Methods and outputs</h2><p>Methods include health economics, applied econometrics, discrete choice experiments, stated-preference methods, decision-support modelling and policy translation where relevant.</p><p><a href="/publications/">Related publications</a> · <a href="/tools/">Related tools</a></p></div></section>
```
